---
name: Package report
about: Report a malicious, broken, or rights-infringing package on the registry
labels: package-report
---

**Package**

`owner/name` and version(s):

**Reason**

- [ ] Malicious behavior (describe below)
- [ ] Broken / does not run
- [ ] Impersonation or rights infringement
- [ ] Other

**Details**

For suspected malicious packages, do not post exploit details publicly —
email yuvitbatra@gmail.com (see SECURITY.md) and open this issue without the
specifics.
